title: Add ABRACAPOCUS_WORKING_ROOT to config
description:
Add working_root: Path to PathSettings in config.py
Load ABRACAPOCUS_WORKING_ROOT from env with Path.cwd() default
Document variable in .env.example and config-show output
Verification: `python -m pytest tests/ -x`
acceptance_criteria: ABRACAPOCUS_WORKING_ROOT env var sets working_root in AppConfig
Default Path.cwd() applies when env var is not set
